title: gentiana hesseliana var. lakshnakarae
intro: Gentiana hesseliana var. lakshnakarae, also known as Lakshnakarae Gentian, is a rare and endemic species of flowering plant native to Sri Lanka. It is a type of gentian, a genus of plants that have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and fever. The roots and rhizomes of the Lakshnakarae Gentian are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. Gentiana hesseliana var. lakshnakarae is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
